description: iOS mobile app with liquid glass native tabs, swipe card UI for actions/contacts, and AI agent chat

tasks.description: Create Expo app in apps/mobile with TypeScript template
steps: Run `cd apps && npx create-expo-app@latest mobile --template blank-typescript`
Verify apps/mobile/package.json exists with expo dependency
Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo start` and verify Metro bundler starts

tasks.description: Install Expo Router and navigation dependencies
steps: Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install expo-router expo-constants expo-linking expo-status-bar`
Create apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx with basic Slot export
Run `npx expo start` and verify no router errors
Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install react-native-reanimated react-native-gesture-handler`
Add reanimated plugin to app.json plugins array
Create test file with `import Animated from 'react-native-reanimated'`
Run `npx expo start --clear` and verify no reanimated errors
Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install expo-symbols expo-blur expo-glass-effect expo-haptics expo-image`

tasks.description: Install NativeWind v5 and Tailwind v4 with react-native-css
steps: Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install tailwindcss@^4 nativewind@5.0.0-preview.2 react-native-css@0.0.0-nightly.5ce6396 @tailwindcss/postcss tailwind-merge clsx`

tasks.description: Install Convex and offline storage dependencies
steps: Run `cd apps/mobile && pnpm add convex react-native-mmkv`
Verify package.json has convex and react-native-mmkv
Create apps/mobile/metro.config.js with getDefaultConfig and withNativewind
Set inlineVariables: false and globalClassNamePolyfill: false
Run `npx expo start --clear` and verify Metro starts with NativeWind

tasks.description: Create PostCSS config for Tailwind v4
Create global CSS with Tailwind imports and platform fonts
steps: Add @media ios block with --font-mono: ui-monospace, --font-sans: system-ui
Add @media android block with --font-mono: monospace, --font-sans: normal

tasks.description: Create Apple semantic colors CSS file
steps: Add :root with --sf-blue, --sf-green, --sf-red using light-dark() for web/Android
Add @media ios block with platformColor(systemBlue), platformColor(label), etc.
Add @layer theme with @theme mapping --color-sf-* to CSS variables
Add expo.newArchEnabled: true for New Architecture

tasks.description: Test Phase 1 setup compiles and runs
steps: Verify Metro bundler starts without errors
Check Metro logs for any NativeWind/Tailwind warnings

tasks.description: Configure Turborepo dev scripts for mobile app
steps: Add dev script to apps/mobile/package.json: `"dev": "expo start"`
Update turbo.json to include apps/mobile in pipeline if needed
Run `pnpm dev` from root and verify mobile app starts alongside other apps
Verify `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint` include mobile app

tasks.description: Create CSS component wrappers for View, Text, ScrollView
steps: Export View wrapper: useCssElement(RNView, props, { className: 'style' })
Export Text wrapper: useCssElement(RNText, props, { className: 'style' })
Export ScrollView wrapper with className and contentContainerClassName mapping
Export useCSSVariable hook for CSS variable access

tasks.description: Create CSS-wrapped Image component with expo-image
steps: Import Image from expo-image and createAnimatedComponent from reanimated
Map objectFit style to contentFit prop
Map objectPosition style to contentPosition prop
Create AdaptiveGlass that uses GlassView on iOS 26+ when transparency not reduced
Fall back to BlurView tint='systemMaterial' on older iOS
Fall back to solid View on Android/unsupported

tasks.description: Test CSS wrappers with Tailwind classes
steps: Render <View className='flex-1 bg-sf-bg p-4'><Text className='text-sf-text text-xl'>Test</Text></View>
Verify text renders with correct color
Toggle dark mode in Simulator, verify colors adapt

tasks.description: Create root layout with NativeTabs (liquid glass)
steps: Import NativeTabs, Icon, Label, Badge from expo-router/unstable-native-tabs
Add (actions) trigger with Icon sf={{ default: 'tray', selected: 'tray.full' }}
Add (contacts) trigger with Icon sf={{ default: 'person.2', selected: 'person.2.fill' }}
Add (agent) trigger with Icon sf={{ default: 'sparkles', selected: 'sparkles' }}
Configure screenOptions: headerTransparent: true, headerLargeTitle: true
Set headerBlurEffect: 'none' for liquid glass compatibility
Add Stack.Screen for index with title 'Actions'
Add placeholder Text: 'Actions will appear here'
Configure same transparent header options as actions
Add Stack.Screen for index with title 'Contacts'
Add placeholder Text: 'Contacts will appear here'
Add Stack.Screen for index with title 'Assistant'

tasks.description: Test NativeTabs navigation and liquid glass
steps: Tap each tab, verify correct screen loads
Verify tab bar has liquid glass blur effect
Scroll content, verify tab bar minimizes (minimizeBehavior)
Verify SF Symbol icons show correct default/selected states
Test on iOS 17 Simulator, verify fallback appearance

tasks.description: Create Convex client with MMKV storage
steps: Create MMKV instance for Convex cache
Initialize ConvexReactClient with CONVEX_URL from env
Create useAuth hook placeholder for token management
Pass auth token from useAuth to Convex
Verify app still loads without errors

tasks.description: Create useActions hook for pending actions query
Create useContacts hook for contacts query
Test Convex connection with real data
steps: Update ConvexProvider to read from process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL
Run app and check console for Convex connection logs
Verify useActions returns data or expected auth error
Verify no runtime errors in Metro console

tasks.description: Create SwipeableCard component with gesture handler
steps: Import useSharedValue, useAnimatedStyle, withSpring, interpolate from reanimated
Create Pan gesture with onUpdate setting translation values
In onEnd: check if |offsetX| > threshold or |offsetY| > threshold
If below threshold, animate back with withSpring(0)

tasks.description: Add swipe direction overlays to SwipeableCard
steps: Create rightOverlayOpacity interpolating from translateX [0, THRESHOLD] -> [0, 0.95]
Add right overlay: bg-[#00806B] (teal) with checkmark icon and 'Send' text
Add left overlay: bg-neutral-600 (gray) with X icon and 'Discard' text
Add up overlay: bg-amber-700 with clock icon and 'Snooze' text
Use SymbolView from expo-symbols for icons

tasks.description: Add programmatic swipe trigger to SwipeableCard
steps: When trigger set, animate to peek position (threshold + 20)
After 150ms, call onSwipe and animate off screen

tasks.description: Create CardStack component for stacked cards
steps: Accept actions array, totalCount, onSwipe callback, renderCard function
Map visible cards with stacked positioning: scale = 1 - index * 0.04, y = index * 8
Set zIndex = VISIBLE_CARDS - index for proper stacking
Wrap with AnimatePresence for enter/exit animations
Render centered empty state with FadeIn animation
Add party popper icon using SymbolView name='party.popper'
Add 'New actions will appear here' subtext

tasks.description: Add header and count display to CardStack
steps: Add header View with totalCount display
Wrap each in GlassView isInteractive for liquid glass effect
Add SF Symbols: xmark, clock, checkmark
Create test screen with SwipeableCard containing placeholder content
Drag card right, verify teal overlay appears progressively
Release past threshold, verify onSwipe('right') called
Drag card left, verify gray overlay and onSwipe('left')
Drag card up, verify amber overlay and onSwipe('up')
Drag and release below threshold, verify card snaps back
Verify haptic feedback on swipe completion
Accept personName, messageTimestamp, messages, responseText, onResponseChange props
Create header with Avatar (initials from name)
Display person name and relative timestamp
Show sender name for group chats
Add TextInput at bottom for response draft
Add data-selectable='true' to prevent swipe while typing

tasks.description: Create ContactCard component for new contacts
steps: Accept personName, createdAt, platform, formData, onFormChange props
Create header with Avatar and 'You met someone new' text
Add editable TextInput for name with User icon
Add editable TextInput for company with Building2 icon
Add editable TextInput for tags (comma-separated) with Tag icon
Add TextInput for notes with FileText icon
Track form state and call onFormChange on changes

tasks.description: Create barrel export for card components
Test card components with mock data
steps: Create test screen rendering MessageResponseCard with mock messages
Verify messages display in correct order
Type in response input, verify onResponseChange fires
Render ContactCard with mock form data
Edit name field, verify onFormChange fires with updated data

tasks.description: Implement Actions tab with CardStack and real data
steps: Render CardStack with actions from useActions
In renderCard: check action.type, render MessageResponseCard for 'respond'/'follow_up'

tasks.description: Implement swipe handler with Convex mutation
steps: On swipe right: call mutation with direction='right', responseText
On swipe left: call mutation with direction='left'
On swipe up: show snooze picker (next task)
Set contentStyle: { backgroundColor: 'transparent' } for glass effect
Add preset buttons: 1 hour, 3 hours, Tomorrow 9am, Next Monday 9am
On selection, navigate back with selected timestamp

tasks.description: Wire snooze picker to action swipe
steps: On swipe up, navigate to snooze-picker with actionId param
In snooze-picker, receive actionId from route params
On time selection, call swipeAction mutation with direction='up', snoozedUntil

tasks.description: Add action detail route for full context
steps: Display full message thread in ScrollView
Show action details: type, reason, created time
Add ActionButtons at bottom for manual swipe
Configure headerLargeTitle: false for detail view

tasks.description: Add badge count to Actions tab
Add loading skeleton to Actions tab
steps: Create SkeletonCard component with animated opacity
Show 3 stacked skeleton cards matching CardStack layout
Ensure test actions exist in Convex database
Run app and navigate to Actions tab
Verify pending actions load and display
Swipe right on message action, verify mutation called
Verify action removed from queue after swipe
Swipe up, verify snooze picker opens
Select snooze time, verify action snoozed
Tap card to open detail, verify full context displays
Accept contact data: id, displayName, company, lastMessageText
Display name and company on right
Wrap in Link from expo-router with href to /contacts/[id]

tasks.description: Add Link.Preview and context menu to ContactListItem
steps: Add Link.Preview for peek on long press
Add Link.Menu with actions: Message, Call, Email, View Profile
Use Link.MenuAction with SF Symbol icons
Pass search to useContacts for filtering
List all handles grouped by platform with icons
Add 'Recent conversations' section linking to inbox
Ensure contacts exist in Convex database
Run app and navigate to Contacts tab
Type in search bar, verify list filters
Long press contact, verify context menu appears
Tap contact, verify detail page opens
Add basic markdown support for assistant (bold, code)
Handle streaming state with typing indicator

tasks.description: Create ChatInput component with keyboard handling
steps: Add send button with SymbolView name='arrow.up.circle.fill'
Wrap in GlassView for liquid glass background
Disable send button when input empty
Define prompts: 'Who did I talk to recently?', 'Any messages I should reply to?', 'What's new with my contacts?'
Render horizontal ScrollView of prompt chips
On tap, call onSelect with prompt text

tasks.description: Create useChat hook for AI streaming
steps: Parse SSE chunks and update assistant message
Handle errors and set error state
Return { messages, input, setInput, sendMessage, isLoading, error }

tasks.description: Implement Agent tab with chat UI
steps: Use FlatList inverted for message list

tasks.description: Add tool call artifacts to ChatMessage
steps: Create ToolArtifact component for each tool result
For create_action: show action created confirmation
Run app and navigate to Agent tab
Verify empty state shows suggested prompts
Tap suggested prompt, verify sent to chat
Verify message sent and response received
Test tool call: ask 'Who did I talk to recently?'
Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install expo-auth-session expo-web-browser expo-secure-store`
Verify no duplicate expo-crypto or expo-random warnings

tasks.description: Create auth helpers with WorkOS config
steps: Configure discovery with WorkOS authorization endpoint
Create AuthContext with user, isAuthenticated, signIn, signOut
On mount, check SecureStore for existing token
Validate token with WorkOS userinfo endpoint
Export useAuth hook for accessing context
Style buttons per Apple HIG (min 44pt height)
Call signIn from useAuth on button press
Generate code_verifier and code_challenge for PKCE
Build WorkOS authorization URL with redirect_uri
Exchange code for tokens via WorkOS API
Store access_token and refresh_token in SecureStore
Set user state from ID token claims

tasks.description: Add auth redirect in root layout
steps: If not isAuthenticated and not on sign-in, redirect to /sign-in
Show loading indicator while checking auth state

tasks.description: Pass auth token to Convex client
steps: Create useAuthFromWorkOS function returning { isLoading, isAuthenticated, fetchAccessToken }
Verify Convex queries return user data
Sign out and verify redirect to sign-in
Run `cd apps/mobile && npx expo install expo-notifications expo-device expo-constants`
Get Expo push token with getExpoPushTokenAsync
Store in users table for authenticated user
Call mutation after successful auth in AuthProvider
Handle token refresh on app launch
Parse notification data for type and id
Run app on physical device (notifications require device)
Verify token saved in Convex users table
Use Expo push tool to send test notification
Tap notification, verify navigates to correct screen
Define small widget showing pending action count
Use App Groups for shared data access
Read pending action count from shared UserDefaults
Generate timeline entries for widget updates
Update from main app when action count changes

tasks.description: Share data with widget from React Native
steps: Use expo-secure-store or custom native module for App Groups
Call when action count changes in useActions
Trigger widget timeline reload with WidgetKit
Run EAS build for iOS with widget target
Verify widget updates with new count
Tap widget, verify opens app to Actions tab

tasks.description: Add haptic feedback to all interactive elements
steps: Import Haptics from expo-haptics in swipeable-card
Add refreshControl to FlatList in Contacts tab
Add RefreshControl to ScrollView in Actions tab
Connect to Convex refetch on pull
Verify haptic feedback on pull threshold

tasks.description: Configure app icon and splash screen

steps: Update app.json with ios.icon.dark and ios.icon.tinted
Verify icons display correctly in both modes
Verify clean output with no errors

tasks.description: Test on iOS 18+ Simulator with liquid glass
steps: Verify NativeTabs have liquid glass blur
Verify GlassView components have glass effect
Verify BlurView fallback for tab bar
Verify AdaptiveGlass falls back to BlurView
Verify no crashes or visual glitches
Verify all interactive elements have labels
Verify swipe card announces direction hints
Verify navigation is logical with focus order

tasks.description: Test Reduce Motion and Reduce Transparency
steps: Enable Reduce Motion in Simulator settings
Verify animations are reduced or removed
Verify glass effects fall back to solid backgrounds
Verify app remains usable in both modes
Verify Actions tab shows pending actions (or create via web)
Swipe up on action, select snooze time
Verify action disappears and returns after time
Tap suggested prompt 'Who did I talk to recently?'
Verify message sent and streaming response appears
Navigate to Actions tab, verify action created
Verify eas.json created with build profiles
Set ios.simulator: true for development profile
Update app.config.js to read from process.env
Verify app launches and functions correctly
Configure Apple Developer account in EAS
Verify build appears in App Store Connect
Add to TestFlight for internal testing
Install TestFlight app on physical iPhone
Verify all features work on device
